Seedance 2.0 loves structure: 
Start every prompt with [Style | Camera] → Setting → Timed actions (0-3s, 4-6s…). 
The more you storyboard, the less chaos you get.

Without structure, this is the result you get. https://t.co/tMKLOzqQSI

Insane.

Seedance 2 can now create epic VFX in one prompt. https://t.co/yLpgBNWaSj
